name: spring-boot4-upgrade
description: Spring Boot 3.5 to 4.x migration skills and diagnostics.

plugins.name: spring-boot4-upgrade
plugins.description: Evidence-first Spring Boot 3.5 to 4.x migration skill for Maven and Gradle. Covers modular starters, Jackson 3, Spring Security 7, test migration, dependency and bytecode diagnosis, JVM and container checks, database migrations, and Kubernetes runtime verification.
